internalName: Bel Roc Villas — Type C (Bel Aire)
place: Bang Po, Maenam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Curved-Roof Single-Level Sea-View Pool Villa - Bang Po
blurb: A two-to-three-bedroom sea-view villa in an exclusive ten-villa development 900 m from Bang Po Beach, Koh Samui — 240 m² of curved, single-level living on a private plot, with a private infinity pool and panoramic Gulf views. Fully furnished, off-plan from ฿15,600,000.
detail:
Part of an exclusive development of ten luxury villas on a 5,892 m² estate, just 900 metres from the pristine sands of Bang Po Beach on Koh Samui’s tranquil north coast, reached by an almost-flat road ending in a quiet cul-de-sac. An extraordinary curved architecture is combined with a tropical aesthetic that integrates the villas harmoniously into their surroundings while ensuring stunning sea views from each home.

The most intimate of the designs, this two-to-three-bedroom villa offers around 240 m² of built area with two to three bathrooms, set on a private plot of roughly 423–432 m². Its curved, single-level form opens fully to the pool terrace and the sea, making the most of the elevated outlook.

Large floor-to-ceiling windows and doors dissolve the boundary between interior and exterior, flooding the living spaces with natural light and framing panoramic views of the Gulf of Thailand below, while the private infinity pool is surrounded by hundreds of thousands of square metres of untouched tropical forest. Delivered fully furnished with a modern kitchen, and supported by comprehensive property management covering common-area, pool and garden maintenance, housekeeping and rental management. Construction of the first villas is expected to complete by August 2026; offered freehold or on a 30+30-year leasehold.

features.l: Panoramic Gulf of Thailand sea views
